fixes_applied.fix: Removed 3 noindexed scenario pages from sitemap.xml
fixes_applied.rationale: These pages are noindex,follow at /scenario/[id]. They bypassed the existing isFormulaVariant filter (hex suffixes don't match pct/yr/mo pattern). Including noindexed pages in sitemap contradicts Google's guidelines and wastes crawl budget.
fixes_applied.safety: Only removed from sitemap — pages still exist and serve correctly at /scenario/[id] with noindex

fixes_held.reason: All 33 are legitimate ?lang=xx language variants with proper canonicals. No misconfiguration found. Validating would fail again.
/hi → (307) → /?lang=hi is correct and intentional. No fix needed. Validating would fail.
Guide is indexable but Google rejected on quality grounds. Content improvements needed before validation. Deferred to content work phase.
Google artifact. Browser asset, not a page. Will naturally drop off.

safety_confirmations: No blind Validate Fix clicks (except proven-safe 404s)
Only sitemap exclusion — safest possible fix
